title: CodeBuddy Access Control Config
description: Controls who can use the CodeBuddy agent in this workspace.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

mode.description: Access control mode: open (no restrictions), allow (only listed users), deny (block listed users).

users.description: User identifiers (emails or GitHub usernames) for the allowlist (mode=allow) or denylist (mode=deny).

admins.description: Users with admin privileges — always allowed and can perform sensitive operations without escalation.

items.description: Admin user email or GitHub username.

logDenied.description: Whether to log denied access attempts.
